version:
deepseek (npm wrapper) v0.8.31
binary version: v0.8.31
repo: git+https://github.com/Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI.git
help_excerpt:
Usage: deepseek [OPTIONS] [PROMPT]
       deepseek [OPTIONS] <COMMAND> [ARGS]

Commands:
  run          Run interactive/non-interactive flows via the TUI binary
  doctor       Run DeepSeek TUI diagnostics
  models       List live DeepSeek API models via the TUI binary
  sessions     List saved TUI sessions

version:
deepseek-tui (npm wrapper) v0.8.31
binary version: v0.8.31
repo: git+https://github.com/Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI.git
help_excerpt:
Terminal-native TUI and CLI for DeepSeek models.

Run 'deepseek' to start.

Not affiliated with DeepSeek Inc.

Usage: deepseek-tui.exe [OPTIONS] [COMMAND]
